data.name: 反派千金II
data.detailed_description:
故事大綱

■盡情享用反派小姐和正派女主！

繼上回重生之後，再次轉生成為乙女遊戲裡的路人祭司？ ！ ！讓傲嬌百變的反派小姐和正派女主成為雞雞按摩師！看不起別人整天裝高冷的反派小姐墮落的樂趣和玷污不知人事的正派小姐的雙重快感！

■濫用新娘候補的判定角色！

主人公成為了判定王子的新娘候補的祭司。利用這一點，侵犯了兩人！跟是在稱為作為新娘候補的試煉，修行里色情鬼畜地調教著肉便器！

還能享受到奪走愛著王子的兩人的NTR要素！

■蹂躪新娘候補的試煉！

給反派小姐的懲罰。正派女主的檢查大腿命令，發誓成為我的玩物以及忠誠的儀式，雙重口交的新娘侍奉修行，求被操舞蹈，爆菊修行，肉便器試煉，赤裸下跪，表現給王子的NTR婚禮，懷孕大肚子PLAY等等，盡情享受反派小姐和正派女主的各種鬼畜色情行為！

■反派小姐的狂傲聲線和正派女主的可愛聲線一同嬌喘！

狂傲的反派小姐，不知人事的正派女主們人事雞雞，成為釋放性慾望用的M母狗！

享受不斷嬌喘，連續淫語的反差聲線吧！

因為詭計而發蹟的貴族一族的小姐。整天想著讓那些奸猾的人為自己所用。

滿臉把別人當傻子玩弄的冷笑，冷酷的反派。

雖然眼裡只有地位和財產，但也喜歡著王子。

乙女遊戲主人公

溫柔美麗的貴族小姐。不知人事的純潔小姐。

一同被選為了王子的新娘候補。

純粹地愛著王子。

特點:

  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。

  • 反派千金帶有日文語音。

  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。

  • 多小時的內容。

  • 帶有音樂和音效。

  • 帶有角色動態。

  • 帶有收藏展覽。

  • 15個與H的劇情。

「反派千金2」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**

所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

欲知更多動向，請關注cherry kiss games的Steam主頁。

data.name: Aristocunts II Re:ERECTION
data.detailed_description:
The main heroine is such a cutie, and the villainess is super hot! It must be easy being the lead in a game where beautiful ladies fight over you... This time that pretty boy prince is going to have his work cut out for him, when you, the protagonist of this story, are reborn in the game world. With all your knowledge of the plot, this replay is going to be a breeze!

How do you put a stop to Rosa's scheme to steal the prince for herself? By fucking her of course! Then the two of you can put your twisted little heads together to find a way to convince pure sweet little Monica that the prince isn't really worth it, when she can be riding on your magnificent resurrected erection! With your balls deep in the pussies of the political powerhouses of this virtual world, you're set up for a quick trip to easy street! You're king of the world baby!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Monica and Rosa are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • A Scene Studio to view all the beautifully drawn sprites and backgrounds
  • 15 sexy scenes spent slamming a couple of Aristocunts.

Aristocunts II Re:ERECTION Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: New Game, new cunts, no problem! After getting transported into the digital world of his favorite fap material, our protagonist uses their game knowledge to steal the hottest babes in the land for himself!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
